name: canwa-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by canwa — project planning, agent teams, and developer tools

plugins.name: plan-harness
plugins.description: Structured project planning with agent teams — unified /plan-gen dispatcher for every doc type, cascade sync, interactive test-report fix-loop with live Playwright MCP execution, /asset route + server-injected lightbox for evidence screenshots. 10 skills (7 per-type generators consolidated), 8 MCP tools, 6 agent roles.

plugins.name: claude-config-manager
plugins.description: Dashboard & CLI for managing Claude Code configurations — profiles, export/import, MCP store, plugin marketplace, sessions viewer. 9 MCP tools, web dashboard, real-time sync.
